items.name_en: [Chipped Version] Model: M46373 This OnTheGo small handbag combines Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant pattern. Toron handles and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin purse is suitable for storing coins or small items. Combining fashion and versatility, it makes a perfect daily companion. 25.0 x 19.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
[Dynamic Code-Changing Chip, Top-Grade Original Order Enhanced Version]
 Steel eyelet hardware, recognize the picture details for top-grade original order M46581 Monogram, Mini Bucket Bag series NÉONOÉ BB Handbag. A Neono embellished with natural leather on Monogram canvas. The iconic Neono reinterprets the bucket bag into a small size design. Sufficient storage space for keys, AirPods, and iPhone. Securely holds items with a leather cord. Multiple styles possible with removable handle and removable, adjustable strap. 20 x 20 x 13 cm

items.name_en: [LV x TM Marellini Handbag] M13099 Black, M13100 White (Three Colors - Murakami)
items.name_cn:
[LV x TM Marellini Handbag] M13099 Black, M13100 White (Three Colors - Murakami)
This Marellini handbag is crafted from richly textured Epi leather to create a refined silhouette, offering ample space to store daily essentials like smartphones. The round coin purse and mirror are made of colorful Monogram canvas from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series and are secured to the bag body with rugged metal chains.
Size: 13.5 x 6.5 x 19 cm
